title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: This comprehensive bootcamp takes you from absolute beginner to job-ready full-stack developer. You will learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks while building real-world projects.

title: React & Next.js Complete Guide
description: Master modern frontend development using React and Next.js with real-world applications and production-ready projects.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Analyze, visualize, and manipulate data using Python with hands-on projects and real datasets.

title: AI & Machine Learning A-Z
description: Learn machine learning algorithms and build intelligent systems using real-world data.

title: Advanced JavaScript Mastery
description: Deep dive into advanced JavaScript concepts like closures, async programming, and design patterns.

title: Node.js Backend Development
description: Build scalable backend APIs using Node.js, Express, and real-world architecture patterns.

title: DevOps & CI/CD Pipeline
description: Learn DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and cloud deployment strategies.

title: Flutter App Development
description: Create cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and Dart with modern UI techniques.

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: Learn UI/UX design principles including wireframing, prototyping, and user research.
